mapper.sql: transfer_id, writer_id, title, content, status, address, detail_address, floor, exclusive_area, deposit_amount, monthly_rent_amount, maintenance_fee, transfer_fee, contract_end_date, move_in_date, contact_phone, view_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT image_url FROM transfer_images WHERE transfer_id = #{transferId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, image_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE transfers SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, address = #{address}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, floor = #{floor}, exclusive_area = #{exclusiveArea}, deposit_amount = #{depositAmount}, monthly_rent_amount = #{monthlyRentAmount}, maintenance_fee = #{maintenanceFee}, transfer_fee = #{transferFee}, contract_end_date = #{contractEndDate}, move_in_date = #{moveInDate}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE transfer_id = #{transferId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transfer_images (transfer_id, image_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{transferId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
